appraisal_events.evidence: « elle fut rompue en faveur d'Albertine » … « Je savais maintenant que j’aimais Albertine »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator marks a decisive shift: his diffuse affections consolidate around Albertine, culminating in his acknowledgment of loving her. This elevates Albertine’s local centrality in the narrator’s emotional field.

status_effects.explanation: Albertine gains decisive prominence as the narrator’s chosen love-object in this scene.
